Work.heading: A few builds I'm proud of.
Work.lede: Each one paired sharp design with motion that earns its place.
Work.allLede: Every build in one place — deep-dive case studies plus the rest of the shelf.

About.heading: A senior Webflow developer who ships.
About.lede: Five years and 100+ projects of production-grade Webflow — component-first builds with CMS architecture that marketing teams and small businesses actually enjoy running. Client-First certified, GSAP for the motion, and React / Next.js when a build calls for it. Fast on day one, still easy to edit a year later.

Stack.headingPre: The right tool for the job —
Stack.lede: Everything here is chosen for speed, maintainability, and shipping fast without cutting corners.

Process.heading: How every project goes.
Process.lede: Clear strategy, clean execution, measurable results. No guesswork.

steps.title: Understand
steps.body: We get clear on the goal, the constraints, and what success actually looks like.

steps.title: Design & build
steps.body: Component-first, performance-first. Real motion, zero bloat, scalable from day one.

steps.title: Launch & optimize
steps.body: Ship fast, then tune against real data — no guesswork, just steady gains.

Testimonials.heading: Don't take my word for it.
Testimonials.lede: Proven results, from the people who shipped alongside me.

Contact.heading: Ready to build.
Contact.lead: A few quick details so I can scope it before we even talk — or just email me directly.
Contact.successBody: I'll get back to you with next steps within a day.
Contact.errorBody: Something went wrong on my end — email me directly and I'll jump on it.
